allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path c:\\PantyPost\\motiondigital -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -notin @\('node_modules', '.next', '.git'\) } | Select-Object Name; Write-Output '---'; Get-ChildItem -Path c:\\PantyPost\\motiondigital -File | Select-Object Name)
